{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321011447189A54EAD2DDFA28861D"}"},"total":27109},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7138426328579408670","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好的，看的很舒服，很痛快，爽文，无敌文，就该这样写，不丝毫拖泥带水，杀伐果断不会啰里啰嗦，和对手讲道理，老头子是好人，师兄弟也是好人，希望不要烂尾","text_exts":[{"e":39,"s":35,"text":"杀伐果断","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774026887FA28861D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227138426328579408670%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227087519624329169951%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1662044512,"group_id":"7087519624329169951","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4Vpa4+ahmkrcG8p7aqgrbyuQ8jurIj0slxvI8UDfN9k","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3118675770479287","user_name":"爱吃小蜜蜂寿司的王云"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3118675770479287","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7087519624329169951","book_info":{"abstract":"新书已肥，主页可看，写的本书后十万年的故事。
【高手下山+无敌修仙+无线爽文+杀伐果断+多位面】
大道有缺，灵气枯竭。
一位渡劫大能云游世间，偶然发现了一位天生灵体的旷世奇才，并将此人强行收为徒弟，闭世十年。
十年后，渡劫大能坐化，
林峰御剑下山，开启了他的传奇人生。
林峰：修仙一途，与人斗，与天搏，我无敌，尔等不服，皆斩！
PS:本文平行世界，武道和修仙各成一套修炼体系。
主角杀伐果断，不圣母，不管闲事，对自己有益的事情，才会去做。除了亲人之外，其他人无论男女，在主角眼里都是蝼蚁。
本文纯热血爽文，有些细节若是不符合逻辑，请各位读者大大一笑而过，务必不要对号入座，更不要与现实生活做比较，拜谢！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1b9dcd94eef0aa0335fe60ae4c8198b8","author":"冯一病","author_id":"","book_id":"7087519624329169951","book_name":"都市：修仙十年，下山即无敌","book_short_name":"仙缘劫起","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#284868","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"22万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":124,"name":"都市修真","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124&name=都市修真&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":42,"name":"奶爸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=42&name=奶爸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":845,"name":"高手下山","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=845&name=高手下山&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7089685628191048227","read_count":"219693","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3246201"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"1555","tags":"都市修真,都市,奶爸,无敌,无脑爽,高手下山","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a14bddb7c09131b3a7bc3be9a990990d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779210887&x-signature=x%2FKTJoZhFSN%2BXNRW99YnOiNdlDk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"50028785138","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.5116435e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321011447189A54EAD2DDFA28861D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点
